title: Refresh configured server restore evidence
goal: Produce fresh server recovery evidence for the configured target heimberry:rest-server/grabowski-recovery-probe through a real bounded backup, isolated restore and repository-integrity probe so privileged actions can become eligible without weakening recovery gates.

acceptance.assertion: Preflight proves the configured target is exactly heimberry:rest-server/grabowski-recovery-probe; no default or dead heimserver backend is substituted.
A real bounded backup snapshot is created and restored into an isolated temporary target; restored bytes or manifest hashes match the probe source and no live path is overwritten.
The remote Restic repository check required by the recovery contract succeeds for the configured target without snapshot prune, forget or unrelated retention mutation.
The canonical server recovery marker is written atomically only after backup, restore and repository checks all pass and records target, snapshot id, timestamp and typed results.
A fresh grabowski_recovery_status reports server_recovery_fresh=true and ready_for_privileged_actions=true for the same configured target.
Any failed or partial probe leaves privileged and power actions blocked; no timestamp touch, marker fabrication, fallback target or bypass is accepted.

metadata.source: T008 host-firewall evidence blocked by stale Grabowski server-recovery marker

observed_status.error: server recovery evidence is incomplete or stale

metadata.outcome: A fresh fixed Grabowski server-recovery probe created snapshot a4973a5a on the configured Heimberry target, restored it in isolation, completed the repository check and atomically refreshed the canonical marker. Recovery status then reported server_recovery_fresh=true and ready_for_privileged_actions=true.

validated_acceptance.configured-target: Probe and post-status used exactly heimberry:rest-server/grabowski-recovery-probe; no Heimserver/default fallback was used.
validated_acceptance.real-backup-restore: Snapshot a4973a5a was created and restored by the fixed probe; restore_probe_valid=true and no live target was overwritten.
validated_acceptance.repository-check: repository_check_valid=true; no prune, forget or retention mutation was invoked.
validated_acceptance.atomic-evidence: Canonical mode-0600 marker records target, snapshot, timestamp and both typed success flags; SHA-256 is bound above.
validated_acceptance.post-status: Eight seconds after completion, recovery_status reported the same snapshot fresh and privileged readiness true.
validated_acceptance.fail-closed: The probe path has no timestamp-touch or fallback mode. A separate Rootbroker stale denial after this success is retained under T030 and does not invalidate the backup/restore proof.

metadata.self_review: PASS: direct probe receipt, canonical marker bytes/hash and immediate recovery_status were re-read. T011 proves recovery freshness only; it does not claim Rootbroker decision coherence.
